subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This servant hath taken refuge at the threshold of Thine oneness and hath clung to the hem of the mantle of Thy singleness, turning his gaze towards Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد التجا بباب احدیتک و تمسک بذیل رداء فردانیتک و توجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for forgiveness
